receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: VP of Engineering at Okta | Driving Scalable Systems & Product Strategy | Building High-Performance, Customer-Centered Teams
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: March 13, 2012, Dan worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description:
George is by far the best technical recruiter I've had the privilege of working with.

He strives for and achieves understanding of people as individuals and the technology they work with, and is incredibly good at assessing fit and potential.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: April 7, 2010, Sonu worked with George on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: George and I worked together for about 8 months in 2008 at Yahoo!  He is one of the most effective recruiters that I have ever worked with.  He is professional, personable, smart, diligent and focused on getting the job done.  He took the time to understand our diverse needs in Production Operations and in a short period of time delivered exceptional results.  He made things happen in a complex environment.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: March 10, 2010, Robert worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George builds great teams. He's good for the teams he's sourcing for, finding good technical and personal matches, and that's great for the people he's bringing on-board. He's definitely the best recruiter I've worked with.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 20, 2010, Fred managed George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George is solid in all facets of the role of sr. recruiter (client facing, sourcing, closing, etc).  Able to take on the most challenging of assignments and client groups.  Deep understanding of the technology variations and nuances of the roles he recruited for, across a broad spectrum of software and internet related realms.  Consistently recvd feedback that reflected the high degree his client groups/managers valued his efforts.  Excellent work ethic, great team player and team member.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 17, 2010, Tim worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is the recruiter that brought me into Yahoo.  It was a top notch, professional experience all the way.  He is a clear communicator and a thorough worker.  It started me off with a very favorable first impression of the company.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 16, 2010, Bob worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is a stellar recruiter.  He is one of the few I've ever worked with who understands the candidate, the hiring manager, and the organization.  He was always well-informed about the job market, the candidate's priorities, strengths/weaknesses, and my priorities.  I was comfortable with the recruiting process in his hands.  He managed the situation extremely effectively -- every time.  His departure was a significant loss to our organization.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Board of Trustees Member at University of California, Santa Barbara
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 13, 2010, David worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George was an excellent recruiter for the Production Operations team at Yahoo, a diverse group of talent with needs in Datacenters, Networking, Computing, Storage, and Software Development. Professional, diligent, focused, and requested by the Senior Operations leadership.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Operating Executive | Scaling SaaS & Fintech Platforms | AI-Driven Transformation & Value Creation | CTO/CPO Leadership | Repeated High-Growth Exits & Org Turnarounds | ex-Microsoft, ServiceNow, Yahoo
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 12, 2010, Ivan worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is an exceptional recruiter and dealmaker - smart, savvy, personable and easy to work with. He was an invaluable resource in sourcing, recruiting and closing on top talent.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 12, 2010, Austin worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description:
I met George when he recruited me at Mobi, and he helped hire a bunch of my guys there.  Later, when it was time to leave Mobi, I linked up with George again and he brought me into Yahoo!  And, again, he helped me hire a bunch of guys.

George is the best technical recruiter I've worked with, on both sides of the equation.  He's pretty good at leveling candidates (better than any other recruiter) and has a great sense of 'fit' between teams, and for routing candidates on the first pass.

In addition to straight hiring & sourcing, he helped drive process improvements within Yahoo! to limit the 'noise' and help deliver qualified resumes; no other recruiters have been able to do this before or since.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 14, 2009, Susan worked with George but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: George is definitely the best recruiter I've ever worked with. He is professional, personal and very helpful. He is excellent communication skills and humorous personality. It is very pleasant to work with George.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Strategic Sourcing - IT Vendor Management & Professional Services Contracts  at Albertsons
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: June 15, 2009, Gina worked with George on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: George was not afraid to make the cold calls and tackle any job that came at him. He would learn any technology necessary that would enable him in making the placement. George was a pleasure to work with.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: December 16, 2008, James worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description:
George is quite frankly the best recruiter I've ever had the pleasure to work with. His negotiating skills, professionalism and wit made our conversations both productive and a pleasure.

I heartily and unreservedly recommend George to anyone.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Global Payroll Leader | Global Payroll Advisor | Board Member | Thought Leader
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 29, 2007, Nathan was senior to George but didn't manage George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George is an excellent and creative recruiter. George has a good understanding of recruiting and quality principals. I recommend George Rider to any organization that wants to grow quickly.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 17, 2007, Dennis worked with George but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: George was persistent and persuasive, and was a significant factor in my decision to join Google instead of Apple when I was leaving TiVo.  He's also a great guy.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Director of Technical Production at Sony Interactive Entertainment
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 14, 2007, Bruno worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description:
George,

What better for a recommendation that to say I miss your great work when it came to hiring and working through process.  I wish you would be back at Sony, especially now that we need to grow our team.

You can direct anyone that needs to know more about your great work to me.

sincerely,

-Bruno

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: September 6, 2007, Paul managed George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George has a very good understanding of recruiting and fundamentally knows his stuff. He has a very good approach towards finding the "A" players and knows how to close them on the position. I would easilly recommend George to anyone looking for a solid senior technical recruiter.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Dr. Business at Iron Galaxy Studios
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: May 1, 2007, Carter worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is by far and away one of the best of the best in his field!  Simply put, I would NOT have gotten to where I am today without his help and guidence!  George is a smart straight shooter who exemplifies the term MAKE IT HAPPEN!

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Product, Program, Process & Team Leader | Process Improvement, Leadership Development, Agile, Kanban, Waterfall
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: April 24, 2007, Marc worked with George but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: It is a true pleasure to work with George.  He is professional, personable, upfront and of the highest caliber.  John Quincy Adams once said that “If your actions inspire others to dream more, learn more, do more and become more, you are a leader.”  George is a true leader in his profession and I am grateful to have met his acquaintance.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Project Scientist at University of California, Davis
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: March 14, 2007, Serban worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George was instrumental in my decision to join SCEA's R&D group as a Visiting Researcher.  Various issues arose that lead me to seriously reconsider joining Sony.  George quite literally came in and saved the day.  He took the time to explain the situation when no one else would and put all my fears to rest.  Here is one of the most interesting aspects of the situation:  it was not even George's responsibility to be dealing with me!  I think that action alone speaks volumes about George.  He is the type of person that just steps up and gets things done.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 12, 2007, Jim worked with George but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: George's technical acumen allows him to assess and obtain the most competent talent upfront.  He is attentive to candidates' needs throughout the interview process, which provides a personal touch.  George is a great company representative to potential hires.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 1, 2007, Todd was senior to George but didn't manage George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George was thoughtful and effective recruiter during his time at Idetic. He was very efficient with my time while finding and pre-screening appropriate candidates.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: aka "Jefe", Solutions Architect, Owner – Company A
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: January 31, 2007, Jeff was senior to George but didn't manage George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George was one of our senior recruiters at the time I worked with him here at MobiTV.  He was very smart, knew the ins and outs of technical recruiting, and was the only resource that was good enough to consistently get me competent new interviewees.  George understands the technology, which makes him a great asset as a technical recruiter.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: VP, HR @ Hayden AI - We're Hiring!
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: January 24, 2007, ChinChin managed George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: George has always demonstrated a great talent for connecting with hiring managers and candidates alike. He takes the time to truly understand not only the technology at stake, but the needs of the hiring manager as well. He is proactive and energetic, and will do what needs to be done to get the job filled with the right candidate.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: November 9, 2006, Bret worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is the kind of recruiter who takes the time to understand both the position he's filling and the kind of person who's needed, then zooms off and brings back standout candidates before you've blinked.  He's sharp, on top of tech, pays attention to details, and always gets his man.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: November 5, 2006, Kevin worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is one of the easiest recruiters to work with. George quickly understood what type of engineer I was looking for, and usually came back with the pretty good resumes.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Fractional Head of Recruiting - Startup Recruiting Expert - 1st Recruiter - Trackonomy  - Crunchyroll - Node - Motiv
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 31, 2006, Seth was senior to George but didn't manage George directly
receivedRecommendations.description: I can't think of any recruiter I would recommend more than George Rider. I have worked with him at two companies that he has absolutely exceeded their expectations. I actively recruited him from Sony because I knew he was a solid performer and would excel here. He's thorough, has a stronger technical acument than most recruiters and really enjoys the projects and roles he works on. He's very easy to work with and has a good sense of humor and outlook. There is no question that I would work with him again.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Fun, conversational SOVAS-award nominated, Source-Connected home studio voiceover for commercials/explainers, e-learning, animation, video games, political, audio dramas, narration and podcasts
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 31, 2006, Andy worked with George but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: George takes the time to get to know his candidates and look for the best fit, not just any fit.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Technical Recruiter at Denali Advanced Integration
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 30, 2006, Dennis worked with George on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: George has a good understanding of technology and he's more technical than most recruiters.  George has great people skills and he's the kind of guy you just like to be around!  George and I made a great impact at MobiTV and hired over 30 people in about 6 months.  George is an innovative recruiter who is as internet savvy as they come!  George is a unique asset in the staffing industry.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 30, 2006, Austin worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George was a great recruiter for us. Not only did he bring in my boss and myself, but he also helped bring over most of my current co-workers.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 30, 2006, Rémi worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is a great person to work with. Always going the extra step to make sure things are going smoothly.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Exec Director, GDC Festival of Gaming | Games & Education Technology
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 30, 2006, Mark worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: When I was getting ready to jump out of that plane over 'nam, George was there to make sure my parachute had been packed properly by those monkeys we'd hired together.  After that, I knew that any time I needed to find some really great technical people, I could go to George and he'd have my back.  While at Sony we worked hard to find some great engineers and developer relations staff, and I could always count on George to find some great people, and also make sure we had fun and laughed a lot in the process!

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 29, 2006, Mark worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is a great listener and insightful person who has a firm grasp of the industry and its players.  He excels at appreciating the perspective of the person at the other end of the conversation.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 27, 2006, Drew worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is very competent, has a good grasp of technical issues, and has an easygoing, friendly demeanor. How do they say it on eBay? A++++. ;-)

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Global TA Leader | Ex-Cybersecurity, Ex-Storage | Keeping Candidates, Hiring Managers and Finance Aligned | Startup, PE, Private & Public Experience | Built Cost-Effective Recruiting Systems That Scale
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 27, 2006, Leilani worked with George on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: George was always the go to person when anyone wanted to "get the ball rolling".  He was always willing to go the extra mile to make sure his candidates and hiring managers were happy and taken care of.  George has extensive knowledge and expertise in the staffing industry and I would highly recommend him, as he would be an asset to any corporation.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Fashion Designer with strong hands-on experience

receivedRecommendations.description:
Having worked with George previously, I can attest to his skills as an excellent Technical Recruiter. He is very knowledgeable in
technology, software engineering, and game development and was often the 'go to guy' for our department.  He has an excellent rapport with hiring
managers and is willing to go above and beyond to get the job done.

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 27, 2006, Antoine worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is a very talented recruiter, going much beyond just sorting resumes, he can find good matches and is good at picking the precious needle out of the haystack.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Senior Software Engineer at Phaserlock Interactive

receivedRecommendations.description:
George basically helped me find the perfect job for me. I was in a fortunate situation where there was about 8 jobs at Sony that I would have been good with, he helped me find the right one.

Thanks George!

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Software engineer with experience across systems development and operations lifecycle with many technology stacks, currently passionate about platform engineering and improving developer experience and reducing costs.
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: August 7, 2006, Allen worked with George but on different teams
receivedRecommendations.description: George is a fantastic recruiter. George was my recruiter, and made sure to go the distance and ensure that I had everything I needed to do my job well.
